x-enumeration-literals.name: Bear To Registered
x-enumeration-literals.description: Change from bearer into registered form.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Certificates
x-enumeration-literals.description: Change of all instruments into certificates.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dematerialised To Physical
x-enumeration-literals.description: Change from dematerialised into physical form.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Global Permanent To Physical
x-enumeration-literals.description: Change from global permanent to physical form.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Global Temporary To Global Permanent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Change from global temporary to global permanent form.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Global Temporary To Physical
x-enumeration-literals.description: Change from global temporary to physical form.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Name
x-enumeration-literals.description: The issuing company changes its name. CA event shows the change from old name to new name and may involve surrendering physical shares with the old name to the registrar.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Physical To Dematerialised
x-enumeration-literals.description: Change from physical into dematerialised form.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Registered To Bearer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Change from registered into bearer form.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Terms
x-enumeration-literals.description: Change in the terms of the security.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Decimalisation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Process of changing the accounting method of a security, for example, mutual fund, from units to a quantity with decimals.(ISO20022)
